promoted_facts.fact: Securitization notes total $4.639 billion with company as guarantor and all assets pledged
Company has NO employees — all services performed by DBI under management agreement
Deferred franchise fees grew from $119M (2023) to $194M (2025) — reflecting accelerating system development
2025 Fixed Rate Notes ($900M) issued Nov 2025; proceeds used to repay prior notes and distribute to Inspire
Available borrowing capacity: $61.2M (2019 VFN) + $793.6M (2023 VFN) = $854.8M total
Accrued settlements $1.881M (2025) — relates to litigation/dispute settlements
Dunkin' Brands Inc. consolidated total assets $13.8B with $8.2B intangibles + $3.6B goodwill
DBI long-term debt $4.6B — securitization notes at parent level
DBI deferred tax liabilities $1.9B — significant tax shield from acquisition intangibles
Minnesota requires 90-day termination notice with 60-day cure and 180-day non-renewal notice
North Dakota — post-term noncompete generally considered unenforceable
Forum selection overridden in Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, North Dakota
